name: Playwright Browser Automation
examples_zh: 用 Playwright 打开 http://localhost:3000/signup，填写注册表单，断言欢迎消息出现并保存截图。
访问三条产品详情页 URL，直接调用 Playwright API 抽取库存状态、价格和主图链接。
把我们的帮助中心首页导出为 PDF，并录制一次搜索问题到打开答案的浏览器视频。
examples_en: Use Playwright to open http://localhost:3000/signup, fill the registration form, assert the welcome message, and save a screenshot.
Visit three product detail page URLs and call Playwright APIs directly to extract stock status, price, and hero image links.
Export our help center homepage as a PDF and record a browser video from searching a question to opening the answer.
